---
title: "8803 Replication QMD"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## ECON 8803: Replication Exercise

Ping Yang & Rohit Borah \|\| May 2026

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Load requisite libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(gt)
library(ggthemes)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
library(did)
library(patchwork)
```

## 1. Pre-Analysis

### 1.2 Main Datasets

```{r}
# Import data
df_s17 <- read_dta("~/Desktop/PhD/Spring 2026/8803 - Economic Data Analysis/Replication Exercise/Data/CBC_Shale_Combined_Characteristics_17_5_Panel.dta")

df_w17 <- read_dta("~/Desktop/PhD/Spring 2026/8803 - Economic Data Analysis/Replication Exercise/Data/CBC_Wind_Combined_Characteristics_17_5_Panel.dta")

```

### 1.3 Descriptive Statistics

```{r}
# Pivot longer to build analysis dataset

bird_long <- df_s17 %>%
  select(
    # Winsorized counts
    num_tot_w, num_grassland_w, num_woodland_w, num_wetland_w,
    num_otherhabitat_w, num_urban_w, num_nonurban_w,
    num_resident_w, num_shortmigration_w, num_longermigration_w,
    # Non-winsorized counts
    num_tot, num_grassland, num_woodland, num_wetland,
    num_otherhabitat, num_urban, num_nonurban,
    num_resident, num_shortmigration, num_longermigration,
    # Species counts (non-winsorized)
    spec_tot, spec_grassland, spec_woodland, spec_wetland,
    spec_otherhabitat, spec_urban, spec_nonurban,
    spec_resident, spec_shortmigration, spec_longermigration
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    Panel = case_when(
      str_ends(variable, "_w")      ~ "wins",
      str_starts(variable, "num_")  ~ "raw",
      str_starts(variable, "spec_") ~ "spec"
    ),
    Label = case_when(
      str_detect(variable, "tot")            ~ "Total",
      str_detect(variable, "grassland")      ~ "Grassland/Shrubland",
      str_detect(variable, "woodland")       ~ "Woodland",
      str_detect(variable, "wetland")        ~ "Wetland",
      str_detect(variable, "otherhabitat")   ~ "Other Habitat",
      str_detect(variable, "nonurban")       ~ "Non-Urban",
      str_detect(variable, "urban")          ~ "Urban",
      str_detect(variable, "resident")       ~ "Resident",
      str_detect(variable, "shortmigration") ~ "Short/Irruptive Migrants",
      str_detect(variable, "longermigration")~ "Moderate/Long Migrants"
    ),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c(
      "Grassland/Shrubland", "Woodland", "Wetland",
      "Other Habitat", "Urban", "Non-Urban",
      "Resident", "Short/Irruptive Migrants", "Moderate/Long Migrants",
      "Total"
    )),
    Panel = factor(Panel, levels = c("wins", "raw", "spec"))
  )

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
# Use gt to create output table of summary statistics

t_1.3 <- bird_long %>%
  group_by(Panel, Label) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD   = sd(value,   na.rm = TRUE),
    Max  = max(value,  na.rm = TRUE), # intentionally excluding min
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = Label,
    names_from  = Panel,
    values_from = c(Mean, SD, Max),
    names_vary  = "slowest",
    names_glue  = "{Panel}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Label) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "Label") %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Bird Count (Winsorized)",        columns = starts_with("wins_")) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Bird Count (Non-Winsorized)",    columns = starts_with("raw_")) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Species Count (Non-Winsorized)", columns = starts_with("spec_")) %>%
  cols_label(
    wins_Mean = "Mean", wins_SD = "Std. Dev.", wins_Max = "Max",
    raw_Mean  = "Mean", raw_SD  = "Std. Dev.", raw_Max  = "Max",
    spec_Mean = "Mean", spec_SD = "Std. Dev.", spec_Max = "Max"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(wins_Mean, wins_SD, raw_Mean, raw_SD, spec_Mean, spec_SD), decimals = 1) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(wins_Max, raw_Max, spec_Max), decimals = 0) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray50", weight = px(1.5)),
    locations = cells_body(columns = c(raw_Mean, spec_Mean))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_borders(sides = "left", color = "gray50", weight = px(1.5)),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(raw_Mean, spec_Mean))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_stub()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  tab_header(title = "Descriptive Statistics: Bird Population and Species Counts")

t_1.3
```

### 1.4 Alternative Figures 2 and 3

```{r}

# Import and maps FIPS data by county

lower48_fips <- fips_codes %>%
  filter(!state %in% c("AK", "HI", "PR", "GU", "AS", "VI", "MP")) %>%
  pull(state_code) %>%
  unique()

counties_sf <- counties(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2020) %>%
  filter(STATEFP %in% lower48_fips) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 4326)

```

```{r}
# Shale by county

# Assign shale circles to counties
circles_shale_sf <- df_s17 %>%
  select(circle_id, latitude, longitude) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  drop_na(latitude, longitude) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

circle_county_s <- st_join(circles_shale_sf,
                            counties_sf %>% select(GEOID),
                            join = st_within) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

# Aggregate shale data to county mean across years
county_shale <- df_s17 %>%
  left_join(circle_county_s, by = "circle_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(GEOID)) %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_birds = mean(num_tot_w,       na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_spec  = mean(spec_tot,        na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_wells = mean(shale_wells_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_birds = mean(avg_birds, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_spec  = mean(avg_spec,  na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_wells = mean(avg_wells, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
# Wind by county

# Assign wind circles to counties
circles_wind_sf <- df_w17 %>%
  select(circle_id, latitude, longitude) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  drop_na(latitude, longitude) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

circle_county_w <- st_join(circles_wind_sf,
                            counties_sf %>% select(GEOID),
                            join = st_within) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

# Aggregate wind data to county mean across years
county_wind <- df_w17 %>%
  left_join(circle_county_w, by = "circle_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(GEOID)) %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_wind_cap = mean(cumulative_capacity_mw, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_wind_cap = mean(avg_wind_cap, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
# Plot data

map_data <- counties_sf %>%
  left_join(county_shale, by = "GEOID") %>%
  left_join(county_wind,  by = "GEOID")

p_theme_map <- theme_fivethirtyeight() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    axis.text        = element_blank()
  )

# Figure 2a: County average bird population (winsorized)
p_1.4_birds <- ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = avg_birds), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "Count",
                       na.value = "grey85", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title = "Number of Birds Counted (2000-2020 Average, Winsorized)") +
  p_theme_map

# Figure 2b: County average species count
p_1.4_species <- ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = avg_spec), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "Species", na.value = "grey85") +
  labs(title = "Number of Species Reported (2000-2020 Average)") +
  p_theme_map

# Figure 3a: County average shale wells
p_1.4_shale <- ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = avg_wells), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "Wells",
                       na.value = "grey85", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title = "Shale Oil and Gas Wells (2000-2020)") +
  p_theme_map

# Figure 3b: County average wind turbine capacity
p_1.4_wind <- ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = avg_wind_cap), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "Capacity (MW)",
                       na.value = "grey85", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title = "Wind Turbine Projects (2000-2020)") +
  p_theme_map
```

```{r}
# Patchwork the plots together

p_1.4_bs <- p_1.4_birds / p_1.4_species + plot_annotation(caption = "Figure 2 Replication")

p_1.4_energy <- p_1.4_shale / p_1.4_wind + plot_annotation(caption = "Figure 3 Replication")

p_1.4_bs

p_1.4_energy
```

## 2. Analysis

```{r}
# Data setup for analysis

outcome <- c(
  "num_tot_w",
  "num_grassland_w",
  "num_woodland_w",
  "num_wetland_w",
  "num_otherhabitat_w",
  "num_urban_w",
  "num_nonurban_w",
  "num_resident_w",
  "num_shortmigration_w",
  "num_longermigration_w",
  "spec_tot",
  "spec_grassland",
  "spec_woodland",
  "spec_wetland",
  "spec_otherhabitat",
  "spec_urban",
  "spec_nonurban",
  "spec_resident",
  "spec_shortmigration",
  "spec_longermigration"
)

X <- c(
  "total_effort_counters",
  "Min_temp",
  "Max_temp",
  "Max_wind",
  "Max_snow",
  "ag_land_share",
  "past_land_share",
  "dev_share_narrow"
)

# Establish key characteristics and labels — variable names match _asinh suffix
characteristics <- list(
  total        = list(birds = "num_tot_w_asinh",            spec = "spec_tot_asinh"),
  grassland    = list(birds = "num_grassland_w_asinh",      spec = "spec_grassland_asinh"),
  woodland     = list(birds = "num_woodland_w_asinh",       spec = "spec_woodland_asinh"),
  wetland      = list(birds = "num_wetland_w_asinh",        spec = "spec_wetland_asinh"),
  otherhabitat = list(birds = "num_otherhabitat_w_asinh",   spec = "spec_otherhabitat_asinh"),
  urban        = list(birds = "num_urban_w_asinh",          spec = "spec_urban_asinh"),
  nonurban     = list(birds = "num_nonurban_w_asinh",       spec = "spec_nonurban_asinh"),
  resident     = list(birds = "num_resident_w_asinh",       spec = "spec_resident_asinh"),
  shortmig     = list(birds = "num_shortmigration_w_asinh", spec = "spec_shortmigration_asinh"),
  longermig    = list(birds = "num_longermigration_w_asinh",spec = "spec_longermigration_asinh")
)

# Human-readable labels matching Figure 4 y-axis order (top → bottom)
char_labels <- c(
  total        = "Total",
  grassland    = "Grassland/Shrubland",
  woodland     = "Woodland",
  wetland      = "Wetland",
  otherhabitat = "Other Habitats",
  urban        = "Urban",
  nonurban     = "Non-Urban",
  resident     = "Non-Migrants",
  shortmig     = "Short/Irruptive Migrants",
  longermig    = "Moderate/Long Migrants"
)

# Factor levels: reversed so ggplot y-axis reads top-to-bottom as in Figure 4
char_levels <- rev(char_labels)


```

```{r}
# Inverse hyperbolic sine transform for both shale and wind

shale <- df_s17 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(outcome),
      asinh,
      .names = "{.col}_asinh"
    )
  )

shale <- shale %>%
  group_by(circle_id) %>%
  mutate(
    gshale = ifelse(any(cum_shalewells>0, na.rm = TRUE), 
                    min(year[cum_shalewells>0],na.rm = TRUE),
                    0)
  )%>%
  ungroup()

shale_outcomes <- paste0(outcome, "_asinh")

wind <- df_w17 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(outcome),
      asinh,
      .names = "{.col}_asinh"
    )
  )
wind <- wind %>%
  group_by(circle_id) %>%
  mutate(
    gwind = ifelse(any(c_num_turbines>0, na.rm = TRUE), 
                    min(year[c_num_turbines>0],na.rm = TRUE),
                    0)
  )%>%
  ungroup()

wind_outcomes <- paste0(outcome, "_asinh")

```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# ATT: Helper Function

run_att <- function(y, g_col, data, label, outcome_type) {
  fit <- att_gt(
    yname = y,
    tname = "year",
    gname = g_col,
    idname = "circle_id",
    xformla = ~ total_effort_counters + Min_temp + Max_temp + Max_wind + Max_snow + ag_land_share + past_land_share + dev_share_narrow,
    data = data,
    panel = TRUE,
    allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
    clustervars = "circle_id",
    est_method = "ipw",
    control_group = "nevertreated",
    faster_mode = FALSE,
    bstrap = FALSE
  )

  agg <- aggte(fit, type = "calendar", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  tibble(
    label        = label,
    outcome_type = outcome_type,
    est          = agg$overall.att,
    se           = agg$overall.se,
    p_val        = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(est / se))),
    ci90_lo      = est - qnorm(0.95)  * se,
    ci90_hi      = est + qnorm(0.95)  * se,
    ci95_lo      = est - qnorm(0.975) * se,
    ci95_hi      = est + qnorm(0.975) * se
  )
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# ATT: Shale

att_shale <- map_dfr(names(characteristics), function(nm) {
  bind_rows(
    run_att(characteristics[[nm]]$birds, "gshale", shale, char_labels[[nm]], "Birds Reported"),
    run_att(characteristics[[nm]]$spec,  "gshale", shale, char_labels[[nm]], "Species Reported")
  )
})
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

# ATT: Wind

att_wind <- map_dfr(names(characteristics), function(nm) {
  bind_rows(
    run_att(characteristics[[nm]]$birds, "gwind", wind, char_labels[[nm]], "Birds Reported"),
    run_att(characteristics[[nm]]$spec,  "gwind", wind, char_labels[[nm]], "Species Reported")
  )
})

```

### 2.2 Figure 4: Effects by Habitat

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
# Plot coefficients

# Coefficient plot matching Figure 4 style
p_theme_2.2 <- function(df, color_fill, panel_label) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      label        = factor(label, levels = char_levels),
      outcome_type = factor(outcome_type, levels = c("Birds Reported", "Species Reported"))
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(y = label, x = est)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
               linetype = "dashed",
               linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_linerange(
      aes(xmin = ci95_lo, xmax = ci95_hi),
      linewidth = 0.5,
      color = color_fill,
      alpha = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_linerange(aes(xmin = ci90_lo, xmax = ci90_hi),
                   linewidth = 1.2,
                   color = color_fill) +
    geom_point(shape = 18,
               size = 2.5,
               color = color_fill) +
    facet_wrap( ~ outcome_type, scales = "free_x") +
    labs(title = panel_label, x = "Coefficient Estimate", y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

p_2.2_shale <- p_theme_2.2(att_shale, "tomato3", "A. Shale Wells")
p_2.2_wind <- p_theme_2.2(att_wind, "deepskyblue3", "B. Wind Turbines")

p_2.2 <- p_2.2_shale / p_2.2_wind +
  plot_annotation(title = "Effects of Shale Well and Wind Turbine Arrival on Bird and Species Counts", subtitle = "Figure 4 Replication", caption = "Ping Yang & Rohit Borah")

p_2.2
```

### 2.4 Event Study Specification

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

# Run att_gt for each of the four groups

es_xformla <- ~ total_effort_counters + Min_temp + Max_temp + Max_wind + Max_snow + ag_land_share + past_land_share + dev_share_narrow

cs_shale_birds <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "num_tot_w_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "circle_id",
  gname                  = "gshale",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = shale,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "circle_id",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE,
  est_method             = "ipw",
  bstrap                 = FALSE
)

cs_shale_spec <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "spec_tot_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "circle_id",
  gname                  = "gshale",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = shale,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "circle_id",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE,
  est_method             = "ipw",
  bstrap                 = FALSE
)

cs_wind_birds <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "num_tot_w_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "circle_id",
  gname                  = "gwind",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = wind,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "circle_id",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE,
  est_method             = "ipw",
  bstrap                 = FALSE
)

cs_wind_spec <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "spec_tot_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "circle_id",
  gname                  = "gwind",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = wind,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "circle_id",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE,
  est_method             = "ipw",
  bstrap                 = FALSE
)

```

```{r}
# Create event study objects

es_shale_birds <- aggte(
  cs_shale_birds,
  type = "dynamic",
  min_e = -5,
  max_e = 12,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
es_shale_spec  <- aggte(
  cs_shale_spec,
  type = "dynamic",
  min_e = -5,
  max_e = 12,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
es_wind_birds  <- aggte(
  cs_wind_birds,
  type = "dynamic",
  min_e = -5,
  max_e = 12,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
es_wind_spec   <- aggte(
  cs_wind_spec,
  type = "dynamic",
  min_e = -5,
  max_e = 12,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

```

```{r}
# aggte tables for review

aggte_to_df <- function(ag) {
  tibble(
    e       = ag$egt,
    att     = ag$att.egt,
    se      = ag$se.egt,
    ci90_lo = att - qnorm(0.95)  * se,
    ci90_hi = att + qnorm(0.95)  * se,
    ci95_lo = att - qnorm(0.975) * se,
    ci95_hi = att + qnorm(0.975) * se
  )
}

df_es_shale_birds <- aggte_to_df(es_shale_birds)
df_es_shale_spec  <- aggte_to_df(es_shale_spec)
df_es_wind_birds  <- aggte_to_df(es_wind_birds)
df_es_wind_spec   <- aggte_to_df(es_wind_spec)
```

```{r}
# Plot data
p_theme_es <- function(df, title, color_fill) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = e)) +
    geom_col(aes(y = att),
             fill = color_fill,
             alpha = 0.5,
             width = 0.6) +
    geom_linerange(
      aes(ymin = ci95_lo, ymax = ci95_hi),
      linewidth = 0.5,
      color = color_fill,
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = ci90_lo, ymax = ci90_hi),
                   linewidth = 1.2,
                   color = color_fill) +
    geom_point(
      aes(y = att),
      shape = 20,
      size = 2,
      color = color_fill,
      fill = "white",
      stroke = 1
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0,
               linetype = "dashed",
               linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-5, 12, 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = scales::breaks_width(0.1),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1)
    ) +
    labs(x = "Years from First Treatment", y = "ATT Estimate", title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}
```

```{r}
# Event Study Plot: Shale Wells

p_2.4_shale_birds <- p_theme_es(df_es_shale_birds, "Number of Birds Reported", "tomato3")
p_2.4_shale_spec  <- p_theme_es(df_es_shale_spec, "Number of Species Reported", "tomato3")
p_2.4_shale <- p_2.4_shale_birds + p_2.4_shale_spec +
  plot_annotation(title = "Effects of Shale Wells on Bird and Species Counts (Dynamic)",
                  subtitle = "Figure A5 Replication",
                  caption = "Ping Yang & Rohit Borah")

p_2.4_shale
```

```{r}
# Event Study Plot: Wind Turbines

p_2.4_wind_birds <- p_theme_es(df_es_wind_birds, "Number of Birds Reported", "deepskyblue3")

p_2.4_wind_spec <- p_theme_es(df_es_wind_spec, "Number of Species Reported", "deepskyblue3")

p_2.4_wind <- p_2.4_wind_birds + p_2.4_wind_spec +
  plot_annotation(title = "Effects of Wind Turbines on Bird and Species Counts (Dynamic)",
                  subtitle = "Figure A6 Replication",
                  caption = "Ping Yang & Rohit Borah")

p_2.4_wind
```

## 3. Extension: County-Level Analysis

### 3c. County-Level Event Study

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

# Build county-year panel: shale
# Reuses circle_county_s from Section 1.4 (circle_id → GEOID mapping)

shale_county <- df_s17 %>%
  left_join(circle_county_s, by = "circle_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(GEOID)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(outcome), asinh, .names = "{.col}_asinh")) %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    across(all_of(shale_outcomes), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_wells = sum(shale_wells_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    across(all_of(X), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  mutate(
    gshale_county = if_else(
      any(total_wells > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(year[total_wells > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
      0L
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(GEOID_num = as.integer(GEOID))

# Build county-year panel: wind
# Reuses circle_county_w from Section 1.4 (circle_id → GEOID mapping)

wind_county <- df_w17 %>%
  left_join(circle_county_w, by = "circle_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(GEOID)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(outcome), asinh, .names = "{.col}_asinh")) %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    across(all_of(wind_outcomes), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_turbines = sum(num_turbines, na.rm = TRUE),
    across(all_of(X), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  mutate(
    gwind_county = if_else(
      any(total_turbines > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(year[total_turbines > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
      0L
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(GEOID_num = as.integer(GEOID))
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

# Run att_gt for each of the four county-level groups

cs_county_shale_birds <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "num_tot_w_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "GEOID_num",
  gname                  = "gshale_county",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = shale_county,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "GEOID_num",
  est_method             = "ipw",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  bstrap                 = FALSE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE
)

cs_county_shale_spec <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "spec_tot_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "GEOID_num",
  gname                  = "gshale_county",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = shale_county,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "GEOID_num",
  est_method             = "ipw",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  bstrap                 = FALSE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE
)

cs_county_wind_birds <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "num_tot_w_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "GEOID_num",
  gname                  = "gwind_county",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = wind_county,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "GEOID_num",
  est_method             = "ipw",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  bstrap                 = FALSE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE
)

cs_county_wind_spec <- att_gt(
  yname                  = "spec_tot_asinh",
  tname                  = "year",
  idname                 = "GEOID_num",
  gname                  = "gwind_county",
  xformla                = es_xformla,
  data                   = wind_county,
  control_group          = "nevertreated",
  clustervars            = "GEOID_num",
  est_method             = "ipw",
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE,
  bstrap                 = FALSE,
  faster_mode            = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# Aggregate to dynamic event study

es_county_shale_birds <- aggte(cs_county_shale_birds, type = "dynamic", min_e = -5, max_e = 12, na.rm = TRUE)
es_county_shale_spec  <- aggte(cs_county_shale_spec,  type = "dynamic", min_e = -5, max_e = 12, na.rm = TRUE)
es_county_wind_birds  <- aggte(cs_county_wind_birds,  type = "dynamic", min_e = -5, max_e = 12, na.rm = TRUE)
es_county_wind_spec   <- aggte(cs_county_wind_spec,   type = "dynamic", min_e = -5, max_e = 12, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Convert to data frames using aggte_to_df helper from Section 2.4

df_es_county_shale_birds <- aggte_to_df(es_county_shale_birds)
df_es_county_shale_spec  <- aggte_to_df(es_county_shale_spec)
df_es_county_wind_birds  <- aggte_to_df(es_county_wind_birds)
df_es_county_wind_spec   <- aggte_to_df(es_county_wind_spec)
```

```{r}
# Event Study Plot: County-Level Shale Wells

p_3c_shale_birds <- p_theme_es(df_es_county_shale_birds, "Number of Birds Reported", "tomato3")
p_3c_shale_spec  <- p_theme_es(df_es_county_shale_spec,  "Number of Species Reported", "tomato3")

p_3c_shale <- p_3c_shale_birds + p_3c_shale_spec +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "County-Level Effects of Shale Wells on Bird and Species Counts (Dynamic)",
    subtitle = "Figure A5 Replication — County Level",
    caption  = "Ping Yang & Rohit Borah"
  )
```

```{r}
# Event Study Plot: County-Level Wind Turbines

p_3c_wind_birds <- p_theme_es(df_es_county_wind_birds, "Number of Birds Reported", "deepskyblue3")
p_3c_wind_spec  <- p_theme_es(df_es_county_wind_spec,  "Number of Species Reported", "deepskyblue3")

p_3c_wind <- p_3c_wind_birds + p_3c_wind_spec +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "County-Level Effects of Wind Turbines on Bird and Species Counts (Dynamic)",
    subtitle = "Figure A6 Replication — County Level",
    caption  = "Ping Yang & Rohit Borah"
  )
```

```{r}
p_3c <- p_3c_shale / p_3c_wind + plot_annotation(
  title = "County-Level Event Study",
  subtitle = "Extension 3C: County-Level Reproductions of Figures A5 and A6",
  caption = "Ping Yang & Rohit Borah"
)

p_3c
```
